channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-02 14:39 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Anyone but a straight, able-bodied, white man may apply for this assistant professor job. How is thi...
item.description: Anyone but a straight, able-bodied, white man may apply for this assistant professor job. How is this legal?

item.title: @elonmusk: This is extremely common in China and you can literally watch it happen through historical satellite...
item.description: This is extremely common in China and you can literally watch it happen through historical satellite imagery. Many sites were developed with coal, and have since been converted into solar farms. Go look at google earth and see for yourself.

item.title: @elonmusk: If ethnicity exists at all, which it obviously does, then English is an ethnicity. This is a simple ...
item.description: If ethnicity exists at all, which it obviously does, then English is an ethnicity. This is a simple statement of fact. It is possible to be culturally English or French or Japanese, etc, but ethnically be different. The first is “software”, the other is “hardware”. This should not be license to be cruel or unfair to people of a different ethnicity. I believe we should be fair to all ethnicities, but not pretend that one or another does not exist.

item.title: @elonmusk: CATO will classify him as “right wing” because he’s a religiously-inspired jihadist and “American” b...
item.description: CATO will classify him as “right wing” because he’s a religiously-inspired jihadist and “American” because he’s naturalized. That’s how their vaunted terrorist database works. But then they’ll also be classifying him as a net-paying immigrant because he won’t be taking social security. I’m serious. I am not exaggerating.

item.title: @elonmusk: Another all-time record in 𝕏 usage
item.description: Another all-time record in 𝕏 usage

item.title: @elonmusk: This is one of the best transparency upgrades to 𝕏 since Elon took over. I have turned down more tha...
item.description: This is one of the best transparency upgrades to 𝕏 since Elon took over. I have turned down more than one “offer” because the expectation was that you do not disclose. I hope it is brutally enforced. 𝕏 wins by dominating in authenticity and accountability and this is it.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink Mobile is providing data for video, voice, and messaging services in areas where terrestria...
item.description: Starlink Mobile is providing data for video, voice, and messaging services in areas where terrestrial service is unavailable Working with global mobile network operators, our satellite-to-mobile network has grown to 32+ countries, home to 1.7B+ people →starlink.com/mobile

item.title: @elonmusk: Two orders of magnitude improvement in Direct to Cell (now called@StarlinkMobile) for V2. Huge impro...
item.description: Two orders of magnitude improvement in Direct to Cell (now called@StarlinkMobile) for V2. Huge improvement and amazing forthcoming work by the Starlink team.

item.title: @elonmusk: Another example of video extension using the latest Grok Imagine update: I created an image in Grok ...
item.description: Another example of video extension using the latest Grok Imagine update: I created an image in Grok Imagine. I animated it. Then I clicked on video extension: you can choose 6 seconds or 10 seconds, write an animation prompt, and select the starting image. This ensures perfect continuity of the scene: fluidity of the image and sound atmosphere (music and sound effects).

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk has been planning satellite-to-mobile internet for years and it’s now becoming reality Hig...
item.description: Elon Musk has been planning satellite-to-mobile internet for years and it’s now becoming reality High-bandwidth connectivity directly from Starlink satellites to your regular phone is coming Starlink has officially announced its next-generation 5G Mobile V2 satellites “So in parallel, we’re building the satellites and working with the handset makers to add these frequencies to the phones. And then the satellites and the phones will handshake very well to achieve high-bandwidth connectivity" Elon’s vision: “You should be able to watch videos anywhere on your phone” True global coverage with no dead zones - exactly what Elon has been working toward for years

item.title: @elonmusk: You imagine, Grok Imagine does the magic 🪄
item.description: You imagine, Grok Imagine does the magic 🪄

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink Mobile is partnering with@deutschetelekomto support over 140M subscribers across 10 Europea...
item.description: Starlink Mobile is partnering with@deutschetelekomto support over 140M subscribers across 10 European countries. The service will be the first in the region to launch V2 next-gen technology using our new Mobile Satellite Service spectrum, which will deliver 5G speeds to cell phones in remote areas. →starlink.com/mobile

item.title: @elonmusk: If one is to use the term “First Nations” or “Indigenous Peoples” or “Native Americans” in the Ameri...
item.description: If one is to use the term “First Nations” or “Indigenous Peoples” or “Native Americans” in the Americas and Antipodes, then, in fairness, it should also apply to English, French, Spanish and other such peoples in Europe
